name: bezelbub-mcp
description: Frame screenshots and screen recordings in Apple device bezels (iPhone, iPad, Mac, iMac, Apple TV mockups).
long_description:
Bezelbub composites realistic Apple device bezels onto screenshots and screen recordings — device mockups for App Store pages, marketing sites, and demo videos.

Tools: frame a screenshot as a framed PNG, frame a screen recording as a framed MP4 (or a transparent HEVC-with-alpha .mov, with an optional VP9/WebM copy for Chrome/Firefox), and list/match the device catalog (38 devices: iPhone 14–17 families, iPads, MacBooks, iMac, Apple TV).

Requires the bezelbub CLI on this Mac: `brew install cwooddgr/tap/bezelbub`. macOS only — the engine is a macOS-native binary.

bezelbub_cli_path.title: bezelbub CLI path
bezelbub_cli_path.description: Path to the bezelbub binary. Leave blank if it is installed via Homebrew (brew install cwooddgr/tap/bezelbub) — the server finds it in /opt/homebrew/bin or /usr/local/bin automatically.

tools.name: frame_image
tools.description: Frame a screenshot in an Apple device bezel (device mockup); writes a framed PNG.

tools.name: frame_video
tools.description: Frame a screen recording in a device bezel; framed MP4, or transparent HEVC-alpha .mov with optional WebM copy.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List available device bezels, or match a screenshot/recording/pixel size to devices.
